task: Finish setting up the starting position of a chessboard that is almost arranged
raw:
Scene: chessboard, chess_pieces, table
Step 1: reach(chess_piece)
  affordance_region: the white chess piece
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chess_piece, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chess_piece) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(chess_piece)
  affordance_region: the top of the chess piece
  contact: holding(chess_piece) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(chess_piece)
Step 3: place(chess_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the chessboard
  contact: surface_contact(chess_piece, chessboard) [completion]; released(chess_piece) [completion]
  pose: stable(chess_piece) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(chess_piece, chessboard) AND released(chess_piece) AND stable(chess_piece)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top of the chess piece
an empty area on the chessboard
steps.done_when: surface_contact(chess_piece, chessboard) AND released(chess_piece) AND stable(chess_piece)
